creator: dbaio@freebsd.org
text:
Fix the patch (files/patch-include_my_tcpd.h).
After MFC (r272947, r272950) is necessary to change this patch.
I deleted the current patch and I created two extra patch for being used correctly on systems that this package is built.

I am based on FreeBSD version values (https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/versions.html) and on the date that the MFC was merged.

PR reference:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=42336
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=32808
